arguments.help: Perform a shared release deployment. This forbids local package builds and forked mache sources.
E3SM-Unified version to deploy. If not provided, deploy/hooks.py will resolve it from the feedstock recipe.
Where to get the e3sm-unified package from. Default is conda-forge
The e3sm-unified package variant to deploy. Defaults to hpc on supported machines and nompi otherwise.
Whether to deploy a single pixi environment or separate login/compute environments. Defaults to dual on supported machines and single otherwise.
Temporary directory for Spack builds when deploying the hpc variant.
Directory where a copy of the generated load script should be written.
